positive: Minimalist aesthetic of a stylized cosmic forest. Giant, bioluminescent flora with elegant, sweeping curved forms, forming a dense yet airy canopy. The trees have vibrant cyan and electric violet hues, contrasted by deep indigo shadows. A central, gently winding river of soft milky white light flows through the scene, reflecting the glowing foliage. Perfect symmetry and central composition. Inspired by Art Nouveau flow and ethereal psychedelia. Solid silhouette design suitable for screen printing, flat background on textile, high contrast, vector graphic style, ultra detailed, 8k, volumetric lighting, --ar 1:1
